evals.prompt: How do I build a lead magnet funnel?
evals.expected_output: Step-by-step guide for building a lead magnet funnel with opt-in page, delivery mechanism, and follow-up sequence.

assertions.name: funnel_steps
assertions.description: Must outline the core funnel steps: opt-in page, thank-you/delivery page, and follow-up email sequence

assertions.name: lead_magnet_advice
assertions.description: Must provide guidance on lead magnet types and what makes a compelling opt-in offer

assertions.name: conversion_tips
assertions.description: Must include conversion optimization tips for the opt-in page (headline, CTA, social proof)

evals.prompt: My sales page converts at 1.2% — how do I optimize it?
evals.expected_output: Diagnostic framework for low-converting sales pages with specific optimization recommendations.

assertions.name: benchmark_context
assertions.description: Must contextualize 1.2% against typical sales page benchmarks (1-3% for cold traffic, 3-10% for warm)

assertions.name: specific_fixes
assertions.description: Must recommend specific fixes like headline testing, social proof, objection handling, or CTA improvements

assertions.name: ab_testing
assertions.description: Must suggest A/B testing methodology for systematically improving conversion

evals.prompt: Design a product launch funnel with a 4-video series leading to a cart open
evals.expected_output: Product Launch Formula-style funnel with pre-launch content sequence, cart open/close, and urgency mechanics.

assertions.name: plf_structure
assertions.description: Must outline the 4-video pre-launch sequence with content themes for each video (opportunity, transformation, ownership, offer)

assertions.name: cart_mechanics
assertions.description: Must describe cart open/close mechanics with urgency (deadline, bonuses, scarcity)

assertions.name: email_integration
assertions.description: Must integrate email sequences for each phase (pre-launch nurture, cart open announcement, cart close urgency)
